matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: We generated WT-MATR3:AviTag, S85C-MATR3:AviTag, and F115C-MATR3:AviTag expression vectors and transfected these constructs into HEK 293 cells.

primary_variables.matched_definition: Loss of one or more bases or a genomic region affecting coding or regulatory sequence.
evidence: To define whether interactions between MATR3 and its partners involved any of the recognizable sequence elements (RRM1, RRM2, ZnF1, and ZnF2), we obtained variants of MATR3, initially described by Salton et al., in which each RRM and ZnF motif were deleted.

attributes.agent: WT-MATR3:AviTag, S85C-MATR3:AviTag, F115C-MATR3:AviTag, and MATR3 deletion mutants (ΔRRM1, ΔRRM2, ΔZnF1, ΔZnF2)
evidence: HEK 293 cells were transfected with wild-type and mutated Avi-tagged plasmids
Twenty-four hours post transfection, the cells were rinsed three times with 1x PBS and then harvested by scraping.
Twenty-four hours post transfection, the cells were rinsed three times with 1x PBS and then harvested by scraping.

replicate_hints: Data from five replicate control samples was compared to data from four replicates of samples from affinity capture with WT-MATR3-Avi, three replicates of capture with S85C-MATR3:AviTag, and three replicates of capture with S85C- or F115C-MATR3:AviTag.

evidence: To control for background binding to affinity capture media, we incubated the avidin-magnetic beads with lysates of untransfected HEK293 cells.
the change in abundance was determined by the ratio of the total number of identified MS/MS spectra for a particular protein between the wild-type MATR3 and mutated MATR3 samples.
the change in abundance was determined by the ratio of the total number of identified MS/MS spectra for a particular protein between the wild-type MATR3 and mutated MATR3 samples.

In assessing the relative binding of these proteins to each of 4 deletion mutants, we normalized the spectral counts by a correction factor to account for different levels of each MATR3 deletion mutant that was captured

targets_and_enrichments.ontology_label: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment used a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer for shotgun proteomics with label-free spectral counting for quantification.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study explicitly describes an affinity capture paradigm using AviTag-biotinylation and streptavidin beads.
